commands.repair_reason: The remaining action is contributor real-behavior proof or explicit maintainer proof override, not an automated code repair.; Cleared: The diff only changes local config scanning and focused tests, with no new dependency, workflow, package-resolution, lifecycle, permission, download, or secrets-handling surface. (sha=f11a286270565d9ab555372e6e2b4322a5911d27)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `channels.modelByChannel` scanning to doctor configured-plugin install repair, covering slash-qualified channel override values and provider-keyed alias maps with regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main opts out of channel override scanning while deriving provider ids, so a config whose only model-provider ref is under `channels.modelByChannel` will not contribute that provider to configured-plugin repair.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is contributor real-behavior proof or explicit maintainer proof override, not an automated code repair.

target.title: fix(doctor): include channel model provider repairs
target.body:
## Summary
- include channel model overrides when collecting configured provider ids for plugin install repair
- keep provider catalog matching unchanged once provider ids are collected
- add regression coverage for providers only referenced through `channels.modelByChannel`

Fixes #83288.

## Real behavior proof

![PR 83328 before/after proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83328-fresh/pr-83328/pr-83328-fix-doctor-include-channel-model-provider-repair-before-after-proof.png)

Fresh deterministic proof artifacts:
- Summary: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83328-fresh/pr-83328/summary.txt
- Before/source proof log: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83328-fresh/pr-83328/before-source-proof.log
- After/PR proof log: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/giodl73-repo/openclaw/proof-artifacts/pr-83328-fresh/pr-83328/after-pr-83328.log

- Behavior or issue addressed: configured plugin install repair should include provider ids that only appear in channel-scoped model overrides.
- Real environment tested: WSL Ubuntu OpenClaw worktree at `/root/src/openclaw-branches/fix-channel-model-provider-repair-83288`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.test.ts` and `pnpm check:changed`.
- Evidence after fix (terminal capture):

```text
RUN  v4.1.6 /root/src/openclaw-branches/fix-channel-model-provider-repair-83288

✓ commands  ../../src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.test.ts (16 tests) 839ms

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  16 passed (16)

[check:changed] src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.test.ts: core test
[check:changed] src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.ts: core production
Import cycle check: 0 runtime value cycle(s).
```

- Observed result after fix: a config whose only Anthropic model reference is `channels.modelByChannel.discord.default = "anthropic/claude-opus-4-7"` collects `anthropic-provider` from the provider install catalog.
- What was not tested: a live doctor repair installing a real provider plugin package.
- Before evidence (terminal/code capture from `origin/main`):

```text
src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.ts before this patch explicitly excluded channel overrides:
  for (const { value } of collectConfiguredModelRefs(cfg, {
    includeChannelModelOverrides: false,
  })) {

A provider used only in channels.modelByChannel was therefore invisible to configured provider repair.
```

## Root Cause
- Root cause: provider id collection opted out of channel model override scanning even though those overrides can be the only configured use of a provider.
- Missing detection / guardrail: no regression test covered provider catalog repair from `channels.modelByChannel` model refs.
- Contributing context: `collectConfiguredModelRefs` already supports channel overrides by default, but this caller disabled them.

## Regression Test Plan
- Coverage level that should have caught this: unit test.
- Target test or file: `src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.test.ts`.
- Scenario the test should lock in: a channel-only model override contributes its provider id to configured plugin install repair.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: the bug is isolated to provider-id collection before repair/install execution.

## Validation
- `CI=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
